_note: This service exposes a Commander CLI, not an HTTP API. Entries below are CLI subcommands; method is the binary, path is the subcommand. See arch-decisions.json component:CLI for the cross-app staging boundary.

check.description: Validate required config and probe connectivity to source, S3, and the staging PostgreSQL (read-only). Exit 2 on config error or failed checks.

discover --dry-run.description: Report replay candidates from the source without writing S3 or staging. Source config only.

discover --store-raw.description: Discover candidates and store raw replay bytes to S3 (raw/sha256/<sha>.ocap) without staging. Full app config.

discover --store-raw --stage.description: Store raw replays then write pending ingest_staging_records rows in server-2's database. --stage requires --store-raw.

run-once.description: Execute one full scheduled ingest cycle: paged discovery -> store raw -> stage to server-2, with S3 checkpointing (--resume), concurrency/pacing, and optional S3/file evidence artifacts. Emits one compact JSON summary on stdout.

contract-check.description: Probe the live source contract (list page, first detail, raw JSON endpoint) with no S3/PostgreSQL writes. Exit 2 on contract break or unreachable source.
